quoteZh: 希望是美好的，也许是人间至善，而美好的事物永不消逝。
quoteEn: Hope is a good thing, maybe the best of things, and no good thing ever dies.

quoteZh: 人生就像一盒巧克力，你永远不知道下一颗是什么味道。
quoteEn: Life is like a box of chocolates. You never know what you're gonna get.

quoteZh: 我们读诗写诗，并不是因为它们好玩，而是因为我们是人类的一分子。
quoteEn: We don't read and write poetry because it's cute. We read and write poetry because we are members of the human race.

quoteZh: 每个人都会死，但不是每个人都真正活过。
quoteEn: Every man dies. Not every man really lives.

quoteZh: 如果你有梦想，就要去捍卫它。
quoteEn: Don't ever let somebody tell you you can't do something. You got a dream, you gotta protect it.

quoteZh: 世界上只有一种真正的英雄主义，那就是在认清生活真相之后依然热爱生活。
quoteEn: There is only one heroism in the world: to see the world as it is, and to love it.

quoteZh: 我们一路奋战，不是为了改变世界，而是为了不让世界改变我们。
quoteEn: We fight not to change the world, but to keep the world from changing us.

quoteZh: 活着本身就是一种胜利。
quoteEn: To live is itself a victory.

quoteZh: 这世界很糟，但是你会爱上它的。
quoteEn: The world is a bad place, but you're going to love it.

quoteZh: 我不知道将去何方，但我已在路上。
quoteEn: I don't know where I'm going, but I'm on my way.

quoteZh: 你要尽全力保护你的梦想。那些嘲笑你梦想的人，他们必定会失败。
quoteEn: You got a dream, you gotta protect it. People can't do something themselves, they wanna tell you you can't do it.

quoteZh: 你得决定自己是什么。别人给你贴的标签不重要。
quoteEn: You have to decide what you are. The labels other people give you don't matter.

quoteZh: 伟大的艺术家窃取灵感。
quoteEn: Good artists copy, great artists steal.

quoteZh: 回忆之所以美好，是因为我们都回不去了。
quoteEn: Memory is so beautiful because we can never go back.

quoteZh: 时间可以伸缩和折叠，唯独不能倒退。
quoteEn: Time can stretch and fold, but it can never go backwards.

quoteZh: 爱是我们唯一能够感知的，超越时空维度的事物。
quoteEn: Love is the one thing we're capable of perceiving that transcends dimensions of time and space.

quoteZh: 所有大人都曾经是小孩，虽然只有少数人记得。
quoteEn: All grown-ups were once children, although few of them remember it.

quoteZh: 真正的自由，不是你能做什么，而是你能不做什么。
quoteEn: True freedom is not being able to do what you want, but being able to not do what you don't want.

quoteZh: 一件事无论太晚，或者对于我来说太早，都不会阻拦你成为你想成为的那个人。
quoteEn: For what it's worth, it's never too late to be whoever you want to be.
filmEn: The Curious Case of Benjamin Button

quoteZh: 过去只是我们说给自己听的一个故事。
quoteEn: The past is just a story we tell ourselves.
